chapter_title.en: Chapter on the wife's Rights Over Her Husband

text: 4538 - وَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "خَيْرُكُمْ خَيْرُكُمْ لِنِسَائِهِ وَ أَنَا خَيْرُكُمْ لِنِسَائِي ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.4538 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings be upon him and his family) said: "The best of you is the one who is best to his wives, and I am the best of you to my wives."
